title: Mild Greek Wild Mushrooms Tzatziki
description: A silky, herbal tzatziki infused with sauteed wild mushrooms, perfect as a macrobiotic-friendly dip.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and saute the sliced wild mushrooms until browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the mushrooms to a bowl and let them cool slightly.
Whisk the Greek yogurt until smooth and silky.
Fold in the grated cucumber, minced garlic, chopped dill, and lemon juice to the yogurt.
Add the sauteed mushrooms to the yogurt mixture and stir gently until well combined.
Drizzle the extra-virgin olive oil over the mixture and season with salt and pepper.
Cover and chill the tzatziki in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes before serving.
Serve chilled with warm pita or raw vegetable sticks as a refreshing dip.
